name: Egg Rolls =20
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet. Quickly cook the bean sprouts over high heat, stirring constantly.
2. Add mushrooms, water chestnuts, and bamboo shoots, and cook for about 2 minutes.
3. Add meat, shrimp, green onion, salt, pepper, soy sauce, and sugar to the skillet. Remove from heat and set aside to cool.
4. Place 2 tablespoons of the mixture in the center of an egg roll skin.
5. Take the two opposite ends of the skin and fold them in over the filling.
6. Moisten the other two edges with the beaten egg.
7. Roll the skin into a log shape.
8. Preheat oil in either a deep pot or wide, deep skillet.
9. Fry the egg rolls until golden brown, turning occasionally to get an even browning.
10. Remove from oil and place on absorbent paper to drain before serving hot.
